personas.name: Knowledge Worker
personas.description: Non-developer using AI for docs, research, and organization. Values simplicity, clear outputs, and minimal technical overhead.

personas.name: Web Developer
personas.description: Full-stack developer building web applications with React, Next.js, Vue, or similar. Needs fast component generation, API integration, and deployment tooling.

personas.name: Backend Engineer
personas.description: Backend-focused engineer designing APIs, managing databases, and building scalable distributed systems. Values correctness, performance, and clean architecture.

personas.name: Mobile Developer
personas.description: Mobile developer building native or cross-platform apps. Needs platform-specific code generation, device testing support, and app store workflow automation.

personas.name: DevOps Engineer
personas.description: Infrastructure and platform engineer focused on reliability, automation, and deployment velocity. Values declarative configuration, observability, and cost control.

personas.name: Data Scientist
personas.description: Data professional working with machine learning models, statistical analysis, and data pipelines. Needs notebook integration, visualization tools, and experiment management.

personas.name: Security Engineer
personas.description: Security professional focused on identifying vulnerabilities, ensuring compliance, and hardening systems. Values thoroughness, audit trails, and defense-in-depth.
example_needs: IAM policy review and least-privilege enforcement

personas.name: Startup Founder
personas.description: Technical founder or solo developer shipping fast. Needs breadth over depth — full-stack scaffolding, quick deployment, and tools that reduce time-to-market across every layer.

compatibility.description: AI coding tools and their plugin format specifications for cross-platform portability tracking

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: Anthropic's CLI agent with slash commands, MCP integration, and project-level instructions

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: AI-native code editor with rules-based customization and multi-file editing

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.description: GitHub's AI pair programmer with instruction-based customization

tools.name: Gemini CLI
tools.description: Google's CLI agent with Markdown-based project instructions

tools.name: OpenAI Codex CLI
tools.description: OpenAI's sandboxed coding agent with Markdown-based agent instructions

tools.name: Windsurf
tools.description: Codeium's AI IDE with cascade-style editing and rules-based customization

tools.name: Aider
tools.description: Terminal-based pair programming tool with Git-aware editing and conventions files

tools.name: Continue
tools.description: Open-source AI coding assistant with extensible configuration and context providers

portability_levels.label: Native
portability_levels.description: Plugin was built specifically for this tool

portability_levels.label: Adapted
portability_levels.description: Plugin has been converted/ported to work with this tool

portability_levels.label: Compatible
portability_levels.description: Plugin's instructions are generic enough to work with minimal modification

portability_levels.label: Incompatible
portability_levels.description: Plugin relies on tool-specific features that cannot be ported
